title: lappula capensis
intro: Lappula capensis, also known as desert heliotrope, is a flowering plant species native to Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced antioxidant defenses. Lappula capensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, making it a versatile natural remedy.
